actions.name: 出货详情_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 出货详情_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT gchksheet.sid,
       gchksheet.yfph,
       gchksheet.fphm,
       gchksheet.cght,
       gchksheet.sjcy,
       gchksheet.jsfs,
       gchksheet.Yfje,
       gchksheet.Yfje
FROM gchk,gchksheet 
WHERE (gchk.rid=gchksheet.pid) 
  AND (gchk.sb=[采购付款核对.付款资料.识别]) 
ORDER BY gchksheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应采购付款
actions.caption: 对应采购付款
actions.expression:
SELECT gchk.sid 
FROM gchk 
WHERE (gchk.sb=[采购付款核对.付款资料.识别]) 
ORDER BY gchk.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应异地采购付款
actions.caption: 对应异地采购付款
actions.expression:
SELECT ydhk.sid 
FROM ydhk 
WHERE (ydhk.sb=[采购付款核对.付款资料.识别]) 
ORDER BY ydhk.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-金额合计
actions.caption: 计算-金额合计
actions.expression: [采购付款核对.付款资料.付款金额]
actions.output: 采购付款核对.金额合计
